# CPMessageTrailingItem

**Enumeration**

The accessories that a message list item can display in its trailing region.

## Declaration

```swift
enum CPMessageTrailingItem
```

## Overview

Use these constants when creating instances of [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMessageListItemTrailingConfiguration]. A trailing item can provide additional context for a list item’s contents, or help communicate its behavior.

## Trailing Items

- **CPMessageTrailingItem.none**: Don’t show a trailing item.
- **CPMessageTrailingItem.mute**: Show a muted speaker icon.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Getting the Trailing Item

- **trailingItem**: The configuration’s item.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
title: CPMessageTrailingItem
